name: booking_messaging_policy
description: Booking messaging policy: external customer send, payment content, cancellation, submit, customer PII.

rules.description: Sending payment-related content to a booking customer.
rules.reason: Payment confirmation message to an external customer requires human approval

rules.description: Submitting a form / clicking send in a booking dashboard.
rules.reason: Browser submit/send in a booking flow is an external, hard-to-undo action

rules.description: Customer PII headed to an external send.
rules.reason: Customer PII in an external message should be redacted before continuing

rules.description: Cancelling a booking is destructive for the customer.
rules.reason: Cancelling a booking is a destructive customer-facing action
